message:
feat(tools): replace lock-based tool metrics with lock-free indexed arrays

Swap the global HashMap<String, ToolCounters> behind a Mutex for two
pre-allocated AtomicU64 arrays (TOOL_CALLS/TOOL_ERRORS) indexed by
compile-time-known tool position in TOOL_CLUSTER_MAP. Add tool_index(),
record_call_idx(), record_error_idx() for O(1) lock-free hot-path
recording. Re-export new functions from crate root.

Migrate BRIDGED_ENV in llm.rs to OrderedMutex with ToolsBridgedEnv
lock level. Restructure get_env_var() to minimize lock hold duration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
